metadata.title: Build an SRX ACE v3 agent for a content system that processes schema_blur chaos input, producing governed artifacts with explicit validation gates, compilable by SR8 into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

mission.primary_objective: Build an SRX ACE v3 agent for a content system that processes schema_blur chaos input, producing governed artifacts with explicit validation gates, compilable by SR8 into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.
mission.success_definition: Agent produces a governed artifact with all required SR8 sections: Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract.; Validation gates are explicitly defined and pass for each section.; Artifact is compilable by SR8 without errors.; Agent correctly processes schema_blur input and returns a coherent, actionable output.

in_scope.item: The agent must handle messy, incomplete, urgent, and ambiguous input from a founder_operator in Canada, using the runtime_lens to resolve schema_blur. Output must be a structured artifact with validation gates and SR8-compilable sections.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Agent produces a governed artifact with all required SR8 sections: Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: Validation gates are explicitly defined and pass for each section.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: Artifact is compilable by SR8 without errors.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: Agent correctly processes schema_blur input and returns a coherent, actionable output.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

execution_laws.item: Must operate within Canadian legal and regulatory frameworks (e.g., PIPEDA for data privacy).
Must not produce harmful, misleading, or non-compliant content.
Must include explicit validation gates for each output section.
Must handle schema_blur by inferring missing context and resolving ambiguities without hallucination.

implementation_contract.item: The agent must handle messy, incomplete, urgent, and ambiguous input from a founder_operator in Canada, using the runtime_lens to resolve schema_blur. Output must be a structured artifact with validation gates and SR8-compilable sections.

verification_contract.item: Agent produces a governed artifact with all required SR8 sections: Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract.
Validation gates are explicitly defined and pass for each section.
Artifact is compilable by SR8 without errors.
Agent correctly processes schema_blur input and returns a coherent, actionable output.

receipt_contract.item: sections: artifact_type; depth_tier; runtime_target; should_block; blocked_reason; compiled_intent
compiled_intent_sections: Objective; Scope; Constraints; Success Criteria; Output Contract

validation_gates: Gate 1: Input schema_blur resolved - confirm all required fields present or inferred.; Gate 2: Legal compliance check - ensure no violation of Canadian laws.; Gate 3: Constraint adherence - verify all constraints are met.; Gate 4: Success criteria validation - confirm all criteria satisfied.; Gate 5: Output contract completeness - ensure all sections present and compilable.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
